title: Do Aliens Exist? Trump Releases New UFO Files as Secretly Filmed Alien Doc Drops
description: Donald Trump's declassified UFO files and the documentary Sleeping Dog reignite the debate on extraterrestrial life, yet officials maintain no evidence confirms alien existence.

title: Aliens or illusion? ‘China’s Nostradamus’ tears into Donald Trump’s UFO file reveal
description: A controversial analyst warns the real danger isn’t aliens, but what people choose to believe instead.

title: Steven Spielberg recalls father's own close encounter with aliens ahead of new UFO movie
description: Never mind ET, Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg phoned home to his dad to find out about aliens who told him, 'there’s intelligent life out there'

title: Scientist gives verdict after 'UFO' spotted soaring out of volcano
description: A mysterious green fireball was spotted streaking through the night sky.

title: Diamond Shaped Alien Craft Hover Next To A Raf Harrier
description: 8-4-90 CALVINE ENGLAND While most reports of flying saucers are quickly dismissed by defence chiefs, the previously classified papers show the sighting, which took place near Pitlochry in 1990, was taken extremely seriously. A former MoD official [...]
